backingDescription: TRU is not verified as a directly reserve-backed token, tokenized fund share, pool token, note, tranche, or redeemable RWA claim. It is classified as a legacy protocol/governance and utility token associated with the TrueFi / Brila ecosystem. Any underlying credit exposure should be researched at the pool or vault level rather than assumed for TRU itself.

_meta.notes: Reserve fields are intentionally null because TRU is a governance/protocol asset. Do not treat protocol TVL, active loans, or Brila/TrueFi vault activity as TRU reserves.
